title: sampacca nilagirica
intro: Sampacca nilagirica, also known as the Nilgiri Sampacca, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies that have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Sampacca nilagirica is traditionally used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
